name: io.github.SKalinin909/tradingcalc
title: TradingCalc MCP
description: 19 deterministic crypto futures tools via workflow.run_* / primitive.* / system.* namespace: trade planning (pnl_planning, breakeven_planning, exit_target, scenario_planning, dca_entry, scale_out), risk (liquidation_safety, position_sizing, max_leverage, risk_reward), funding (funding_cost, funding_arbitrage, compound_funding, funding_breakeven, carry_trade), primitives (average_entry, hedge_ratio), integrated decision (pre_trade_check), system.verify. Formulas normalized across 7 exchanges. Not AI estimates — exact numbers your trading bot can trust.
